creator: mharo@area51.fremont.ca.us
text:
I had to change patch-ab from
SSL_LIBS= -L/usr/local/lib -lssl -lcrypto -lRSAglue -lrsaref
to
SSL_LIBS= -L/usr/local/lib -lssl -lcrypto
so that it would compile with the rsa crypto stuff.

I'm not sure what will happen without USA_RESIDENT set to YES.

Michael
